title: helictotrichon bulbosum
intro: Helictotrichon bulbosum, also known as Blue Oat Grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is a perennial grass with blue-green foliage and yellow flowers, native to the mountainous regions of Europe. Traditionally, Helictotrichon bulbosum has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be beneficial for soothing skin irritations and wounds. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be used in skincare products to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation.
